description: Leading the AI frontier at Eka Care to build a more intelligent, data-driven healthcare ecosystem for India. Overseeing development of domain-specific Small Language Models (SLMs) and agentic frameworks designed to solve complex clinical challenges at scale.
Strategizing and building AI/ML-based products for private equity investors. Worked on knowledge graphs, graph ML, time-series analysis, anomaly detection, and diverse NLP tasks.
Developed the technology behind Riyaz, an AI guru for singing assessment (1M+ installs, 10K DAU). Led product development, content creation, and social media marketing.

company: Music Technology Group, Universitat Pompeu Fabra
description: Member of ERC-funded CompMusic project led by Prof. Xavier Serra. Worked on computational models for melodic description of Indian art music. Core member of ERC project CAMUT for commercial exploitation of CompMusic technologies.
Developed state-of-the-art algorithms for real-time chord recognition and pitch tracking on mobile devices, integrated into guitar learning mobile applications.

Developed a robust song version identification system capable of detecting remixes and cover versions. Built a system to automatically identify song structure sections and a music hook identification system.

company: Digital Audio Processing Lab, IIT Bombay
description: Worked with Prof. Preeti Rao on Music Information Retrieval topics, focused on pattern matching-based approaches for tempo estimation from audio recordings.

Developed noise reduction, automatic volume control, and echo cancellation systems for VOIP and wire-line networks. Implemented Group3 FAX MODEMs and G766 FAX protocols for digital circuit multiplexing equipment.
Platform-specific optimization of Windows Media Audio (WMA) decoder on ARM CortexA8 processor.
